title: I Know How To Play!
description: Removes those pesky tutorial banners/toasts from the game!
body:
# I Know How To Play! - ![I Know How To Play Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/i-know-how-to-play!)

This mod simply completes the entire Tutorial Toast in the top-right of the screen.

So long are the days of having to break a log or press WASD!
